data.content: Plan review handoff: move builtin compatibility workflow/profile loading onto an embedded Loom bundle path, then delete `skills::*` fallback resolution from `claim`, `poll`, and `skill` while preserving current multi-workflow selection behavior. Main implementation risk is avoiding a loader cycle between `ProfileRegistry` and `InstalledWorkflowRegistry`; child execution is split across `knots-720e`, `knots-bf17`, and `knots-040c`.
